title: Deutsch Kompass DTZ & ÖIF
description: Speaking books, writing books, and free sample books for DTZ B1 in Germany and ÖIF B1 Integrationprüfung in Austria

dtz.title: DTZ B1
dtz.heroTitle: Pass DTZ B1 with focused speaking and writing practice books.
heroPoints: Speaking book with 60 exercises across all 3 oral exam parts
Writing book with 30 practical units plus 5 full mock tasks
Direct sample-book downloads before you buy
dtz.description: The Deutsch-Test für Zuwanderer (DTZ) is a practical German exam used in Germany. This section helps learners understand the format and choose the right DTZ B1 speaking book or DTZ B1 writing book.

facts.title: Speaking format
facts.text: The DTZ speaking exam includes 3 task types: introduce yourself, speak about a picture and your own experience, and plan something together with a partner.

facts.title: Writing format
facts.text: The DTZ writing task centers on a short practical message of around 80 to 100 words with four content points.

facts.title: Everyday focus
facts.text: The DTZ books stay close to real Germany-based situations such as appointments, housing, institutions, work, and everyday integration topics.

facts.title: Why B1 proof matters
facts.text: A DTZ certificate at B1 level can serve as accepted proof of German language ability for applications such as a settlement permit (Niederlassungserlaubnis) and naturalization. Whether you qualify still depends on the other legal requirements in your case, so always check current BAMF and local authority rules.

facts.title: Who the books are for
facts.text: They are suitable for self-study, classroom teaching, or study groups that want exam-fit B1 practice instead of generic drill material.

dtz.booksIntro: Start with the DTZ skill that feels weakest now, or use both books if you want a more complete speaking-and-writing prep plan.

oeif.title: ÖIF B1
oeif.heroTitle: Pass the ÖIF B1 Integrationprüfung with dedicated speaking and writing books.
heroPoints: Speaking workbook with dialogues, discussion prompts, and picture tasks
Writing workbook with Austria-based tasks, model texts, and mock writing
oeif.description: The ÖIF B1 Integrationprüfung is an official Austrian integration exam. This section explains the exam and helps learners choose the right ÖIF B1 speaking book or ÖIF B1 writing book.

facts.title: What the exam is for
facts.text: It is part of Austria's integration system for third-country nationals and serves as an official language-and-integration certificate connected to the Integrationsvereinbarung.

facts.title: What passing can help with
facts.text: Passing the B1 Integrationprüfung can be used as evidence for Modul 2 of the Integration Agreement. That can matter for paths such as Daueraufenthalt - EU and, in many cases, Austrian citizenship.

facts.title: What the certificate shows
facts.text: Your certificate shows that you reached B1-level German in an officially recognized ÖIF exam format. It can also help when institutions, training providers, or employers ask for formal proof of German skills.

facts.title: Important note
facts.text: Exact legal requirements can depend on residence status and current authority rules, so always check the latest official ÖIF or Austrian government guidance for your own case.

oeif.booksIntro: These ÖIF books help you practice the Austria-style tasks that cause the most pressure, with sample books available before you commit to the full version.
